textByHashes.867d8a3dfd923e9426bb815fdcc7bfaa80249999: Me? I am a Knight of the Wolf. I serve the fierce Justiciar of the Wolf!
textByHashes.2fd6ee93472bb6025d30c293549f5600155062a4: Aye, the most loyal and fiercest of Saradomin's followers! We are the bastion against all that is evil.
textByHashes.7241a7bdf9f8b17f61942819492746ee0bd9f1e4: I was hoping you could tell me... Ah, the white wolf we called her... For she had the brightest hair you'd ever seen. A silver so bright it could blind. Some said she had icyene blood, but those close to her knew better.
textByHashes.7f65176ea31e9fb9b464d2193b8934f52a5e7f49: Close enough. The white wolf was but a mere human, albeit with astounding prowess on the battlefield... She vied for Saradomin's attention the most out of all the justiciars.
textByHashes.1bc53486a7c645033de1a43512b7e71ef2047107: Ah, well... She always wanted to be stronger and never seemed happy with what she had. There was always more.
textByHashes.69bf45236b6b8aca76e67c2e8bf1addb7e5bd935: Was there anything else you wanted?
textByHashes.5fcc7862e2bfa724367efc9826f9b04737f0a20a: There was this time a great evil swept over Hallowvale...
textByHashes.ba252f2990655f1b4f49a5c8d8bfda4338ca7baf: No, don't be so ridiculous. As I was saying... A great evil...
textByHashes.9a97ee0407c20cee63c90de68877d703ec3820ca: The common folk called it the Egregore. They said it could shift and change shape at a moments notice into creatures from the deepest abyss...
textByHashes.f8c7577f183900a30fb647e756f738de254a8898: These folk, they tend to exaggerate. It wasn't until the nobles started spreading word of its ghoulish features, each more horrible than the last...
textByHashes.b34578b92cea9a0ae0a60a2047dbd0b870428180: Talons as sharp as runite, fire-breath, mind reading abilities... Worst of all though, they said it couldn't be killed!
textByHashes.cf5b28160c0d457516ca1bf2d4287bef11addb2f: That was when we took an interest in killing the thing. We are Knights of the Wolf after all! Our duty is to eradicate all evil.
textByHashes.3093ff050ab038dde9aea42b8331aa94e0e9b069: Well, we made short work of it. That is what we do.
textByHashes.27a5c252841fa87074a58860ba03e0e01e3fb07a: With a big sword of course!
textByHashes.2a6edfca21d0d4fa64fda45a699f1ade2d9306b8: It does the job! Once we had shown the head of the beast to the masses, talk of the Egregore soon died down. At least... for a while.
textByHashes.1fa1c1d188173ea6902af7cdf785d939ac29bf08: Yes. It was strange... As soon as the small folk had forgotten about the Egregore, rumours started to arise that it had returned. And so it had! That was the nature of this beast.
textByHashes.9f381fa8cc6a1300ab67e0a1a17d35d8d68413a8: Does the Egregore still haunt these lands, human?
textByHashes.4a6846bdf8952ebde1459d6f05844f1753ddabac: Then you must assume we were quite successful! At least by the time of my passing, the beast hadn't returned. Although, who knows? It could have taken any form by now.
textByHashes.513a01614eb10306e913d1533f98a9a72369669b: Your humour is wasted on me.
textByHashes.875964c703de5fa061fe0a71bee5eca8eb3fd9a5: May the light of Saradomin guide you, adventurer.
textByHashes.c8aab4cd8911597c4eb34a1d3b27e66a6d006505: You dare defile this sacred place? That treasure doesn't belong to you!
